name: inference-proxy
description: OpenAI-compatible inference proxy for Kimaki Pro, deployed at openai.kimaki.dev

scripts.dev: doppler run -p website -c dev -- wrangler dev
scripts.deploy: doppler run -p website -c dev -- sh -c 'CLOUDFLARE_ENV=preview wrangler deploy --env preview'
scripts.deploy:prod: doppler run -p website -c production -- wrangler deploy
